original_image_tags: A pink sheet of paper, likely a document backing or divider. At the top are two hole-punch marks. At the bottom, printed in blue ink but oriented upside down relative to the page, is the stamp:

elements.description: Inverted blue stamp at bottom containing text 'RECEIVED', 'F.B.I. INTERNAL SECURITY', and partially illegible date and department information. Two black hole punch marks at top.
